description: A black-and-white photograph of a smiling teenage boy with short dark hair wearing a dark shirt, standing outdoors with blurred figures in the background. Large white serif text overlaid across the lower half reads '"I just don't want to die."' with a line below in italics reading '15-year-old Miles Young's final words before being murdered by an illegal alien.'
notable_text: I just don't want to die.; 15-year-old Miles Young's final words before being murdered by an illegal alien.
